sql_array: CREATE TABLE Customers (ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, CompanyName VARCHAR(255), ContactName VARCHAR(255), Country VARCHAR(100));

INSERT INTO Customers (ID, CompanyName, ContactName, Country) VALUES (1, 'Alfreds Futterkiste', 'Maria Anders', 'Germany'), (2, 'Ana Trujillo Emparedados y helados', 'Ana Trujillo', 'Mexico'), (3, 'Antonio Moreno Taquería', 'Antonio Moreno', 'Mexico');

CREATE PROCEDURE test_rexecute_4 (in remote_dsn varchar, in max_results integer) { declare stmt varchar; declare param_vec any; declare sql_state, err_msg varchar; declare res_vec_out any; result_names (Company, Contact); stmt := 'SELECT CompanyName, ContactName FROM Customers WHERE Country = ? OR CompanyName IN (SELECT CompanyName FROM Customers WHERE CompanyName LIKE ? LIMIT 1)'; sql_state := '00000'; param_vec := vector ('Mexico', 'Alfred%'); rexecute (remote_dsn, stmt, sql_state, err_msg, param_vec, NULL, NULL, res_vec_out, NULL); if (sql_state <> '00000') { signal ('ZILCH', concat ('Remote execution returned ', sql_state, ' ', err_msg)); } for i in 0 to min(max_results, length(res_vec_out)) - 1 do { result (aref (res_vec_out, i, 0), aref (res_vec_out, i, 1)); } end_result (); };
CREATE TABLE Orders (OrderID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, CustomerID INTEGER, Amount DECIMAL(10, 2), OrderDate DATE);
INSERT INTO Orders (OrderID, CustomerID, Amount, OrderDate) VALUES (1, 1, 100.50, '2022-12-01'), (2, 2, 200.75, '2022-12-02');

CREATE PROCEDURE test_aggs_rexecute (in remote_dsn varchar) { declare stmt varchar; declare sql_state, err_msg varchar; declare res_vec_out any; declare total_amount DECIMAL(10,2); result_names (total_amount); stmt := 'SELECT SUM(Amount) AS TotalAmount FROM Orders WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT ID FROM Customers WHERE CompanyName = ? || '' OR '' || CompanyName = ? || '' LIMIT 1)'; sql_state := '00000'; param_vec := vector ('Alfreds Futterkiste', 'Ana Trujillo Emparedados y helados'); rexecute (remote_dsn, stmt, sql_state, err_msg, param_vec, NULL, NULL, res_vec_out, NULL); if (sql_state <> '00000') { signal ('ZILCH',concat ('Remote execution returned ', sql_state, ' ', err_msg)); } total_amount := aref(res_vec_out, 0, 0); result(total_amount); end_result (); };
CREATE TABLE Products (ProductID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ProductName VARCHAR(100), Price DECIMAL(10, 2), CreatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO Products (ProductID, ProductName, Price) VALUES (1, 'Milk', 1.50), (2, 'Bread', 1.00), (3, 'Butter', 3.00);

CREATE PROCEDURE test_complex_rexecute (in remote_dsn varchar) { declare stmt varchar; declare param_vec any; declare sql_state, err_msg varchar; declare res_vec_out any; result_names (ProductName, Price); stmt := 'SELECT ProductName, Price FROM Products WHERE Price >= ? AND ProductID IN (SELECT ProductID FROM Orders WHERE Amount > ?)'; sql_state := '00000'; param_vec := vector (1.00, 50); rexecute (remote_dsn, stmt, sql_state, err_msg, param_vec, NULL, NULL, res_vec_out, NULL); if (sql_state <> '00000') { signal ('ZILCH',concat ('Remote execution returned ', sql_state, ' ', err_msg)); } for i in 0 to length(res_vec_out) - 1 do { result (aref(res_vec_out, i, 0), aref(res_vec_out, i, 1)); } end_result (); };
